operator_shipment_context: Door to Door and Airport to Airport options for cacao mass shipment
geographic_scope: Ilheus, Brazil (R. Cel. Paiva, 46 - Centro, Ilhéus - BA, 45653-310) to Austin, TX, USA (3rd Eye Yoga and Meditation Lounge, 1701 Toomey Rd, Austin, TX 78704) or Austin Texas Airport

cost_components.export_customs_clearance: for the account of the shipper

notes: Air freight recommended over ocean freight due to infrastructure and distance to closest port in Brazil.
Pricing for air freight is usually valid for 15 days only.
Customs exams are at the discretion of U.S. Customs and are non-negotiable if deemed necessary.
A Surety Bond is required for all customs entries; rates may vary for cargo requiring clearance through other governmental agencies.
